titles.text: デジモンクルセイダー

descriptions.text: Digimon Heroes! is a mobile match-3 card battle game set in the expansive Digimon universe. Players collect and evolve digital monsters known as Digimon to build powerful teams and engage in strategic battles. Through strategic deck-building and tactical gameplay, they embark on quests, battle against other players in PvP matches, and participate in special events to earn rewards and strengthen their Digimon.

Digimon armies from all corners of File Island have been in a perpetual struggle leaving the island in ruins. Unhappy with the state of the world, Ophanimon summons you – a crusader – to the Digital World. You get a pack of energy cards and are given the task of uniting the island.
